CAREER OPPORTUNITIES
Careers

 

The Bethany Group is committed to enhancing the quality of life of people who are older, disabled or vulnerable in Camrose and surrounding areas. We offer a variety of services including continuing care, seniors housing, lodge and residential living, homecare, day programs, as well as the Rosehaven Provincial Program.
  TOP 10 REASONS TO WORK AT THE BETHANY GROUP

If you need more information about a specific career opportunity or job, please contact our Human Resources Department:

The Bethany Group
Human Resources
4612 53 Street
Camrose AB T4V 1Y6
Telephone: 780-679-2024
Email: hr@bethanygrp.ca

How to Apply

All applications must clearly indicate the competition number or position for which you are applying.

Application for employment can be made as follows:

Email your resume to resumes@bethanygrp.ca. 

Resumes must be submitted online to be considered.

HEALTH CARE AIDES 23

Health Care Aides

REGISTERED NURSES 1

RN, RPN

CORPORATE & ADMINISTRATIVE 4

Management, Administration, Payroll, Accounting

SUPPORT STAFF 19

Administrative Assistants, Therapy Aides, Dietary, Laund
